f2p_gates.description: factoryaidroid.go imports github.com/entireio/cli/cmd/entire/cli/agent/types (load-bearing for the fix; comments stripped before grep).
Name() method returns a non-agent qualifier .AgentName (canonical: types.AgentName; rejects the buggy agent.AgentName which doesn't exist in the agent package).
Type() method returns a non-agent qualifier .AgentType (canonical: types.AgentType; rejects the buggy agent.AgentType).
calculateTokenUsage helper signature in manual_commit_condensation_test.go uses a non-agent qualifier .AgentType.
Helper threads a context (context.Background/TODO or a ctx var) as the first arg of agent.CalculateTokenUsage; rejects the buggy arity (agent.CalculateTokenUsage's public signature takes ctx first).
`go build ./cmd/entire/...` succeeds; buggy baseline fails with two `undefined: agent.AgentName/AgentType` errors.

p2p_gates.description: `go test ./cmd/entire/cli/strategy/...` succeeds; informational only per CLAUDE.md scoring rules; never zeros reward.

validation.partial_fix_description: Source-file-only fix (factoryaidroid.go updated; test helper left buggy) -> 0.80; G4/G5 fail, G1/G2/G3/G6 pass.

notes: Replaces SWE-rebench stub (test.sh + test_manifest.yaml) that scored >=0.99 across all v0.4.3 trials as pure noise from the empty-FAIL_TO_PASS fallback (overall test pass rate). The replacement test.sh evaluates 6 weighted F2P gates targeting the canonical agent.AgentName/AgentType -> types.AgentName/AgentType migration in factoryaidroid.go plus the manual_commit_condensation_test.go helper update (types-qualified parameter + context.Background threaded into agent.CalculateTokenUsage). Validated locally on a fresh clone of https://github.com/entireio/cli at base commit fa2c49c: buggy state -> reward 0.000 (build fails, all 6 F2P fail); canonical patch applied -> reward 1.000 (all 6 F2P pass, P2P strategy tests pass); partial fix (source file only, test helper unchanged) -> reward 0.800. Anti-overfit: G2/G3/G4 accept ANY non-`agent.` qualifier on .AgentName/.AgentType (so a user could rename their import alias and still pass); comments are stripped before grepping in test.sh to prevent comment-spoofing; G6 (go build) is the headline behavioral gate at modest weight 0.10 since the structural gates already cover the canonical solution path. P2P_STRATEGY_TESTS is informational only (p2p_failed hardcoded False per scoring_traps.md). repo_dir = /entireio-cli (matches Dockerfile clone target).
